headline: Is Apollo Global Management (APO) Using Its New Shelf Registration To Quietly Redefine Its Growth Playbook?
summary: Apollo Global Management recently filed an omnibus shelf registration covering debt, common and preferred stock, depositary shares, warrants, subscription rights, purchase contracts, and purchase units, giving it flexibility to raise capital across multiple instruments in the future. This move comes as Apollo has been reporting very strong fee-related and spread-related earnings and outlining an ambitious five-year growth plan across asset management, credit, and retirement services. We’ll...
